description:
Operating Area: Greece, Turkey, Ionian Sea, East Mediterranean, Aegean Sea

Ariela is a luxurious 40-meter motor yacht with the ultimate in-deck spaces and top-of-the-line accommodations for 12 people. The tri-deck motor yacht was built by the Italian famous shipyard CRN in Ancona. Enjoy elegant interiors designed by Zuccon International Project, the epitome of comfort and sophistication. For those looking for a bespoke yachting experience, Ariela has a full-beam master suite on the main deck forward with a study room and large bathroom,  and also additional 2 VIP and 3 double cabins. On board, you'll find everything from the latest in audio and video technology to a huge collection of board games and DVDs. wakeboards, waterskis, and snorkeling gear are among the water toys on offer aboard Ariela for those who enjoy making the most of their surroundings. Ariela also include a luxury jacuzzi on the sundeck ideal for rest and relaxation with good company and cold champagne. 

With a refit in 2023 and state-of-the-art technology throughout, Ariela is ready to take you on an unforgettable adventure on the Aegean Sea or off the coast of Turkey or Greece. Book your charter today and get ready to indulge in the ultimate luxury yachting experience.

blueprint.name: ARIELA
tenders: 1 x 10.00m Skipper 34 chase tender with outboard 2 x 300HP

crew.name: Umit Serdar Ozkan
crew.bio:
Age: 43
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Marmaris 
Marital status: Married 
Education: University
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (near-native), French (near-native)

Captain Ümit Serdar Özkan was born in Turkey and grew up South France. He has been sailing since 1993, starting with windsurfing and dinghy boats, and has turned his lifelong passion into a full-time profession in 2013. Since then, he has logged over 35,000 nautical miles, including a transatlantic crossing, and has captained a wide range of vessels from 15 to 40 meters—catamarans, sailing yachts, and motor yachts alike.

With a solid background in management from his previous corporate role as a Marketing Manager for a major international company, Ümit brings a structured, safety-first approach to every voyage. He has a proven ability in not only navigation and engineering, but also in leadership, budgeting, ISM setup, and crew development.
He is known for creating smooth and bespoke charter experiences, carefully tailoring each route to guest preferences—whether it’s exploring the hidden bays of the Aegean, the charm of the Cyclades, or the dramatic coasts of the Adriatic. 

Calm under pressure, highly knowledgeable, and fluent in three languages, Captain Ümit ensures an unforgettable and seamless journey onboard.

crew.name: Taha Yasin Calcı
crew.bio:
Age: 29
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Fethiye
Marital status: Single
Education: University
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (fluent)

Taha Yasin Çalcı was born and raised in Fethiye, Turkey, and has been part of the yachting industry since 2015. With a hands-on background in both private and charter yachts, he currently serves as a skilled and reliable First Mate, combining technical proficiency with a strong sense of guest service.

Over the years, he has worked on prestigious vessels including Arcadia 115 and Sanlorenzo SL96, gradually progressing from deckhand roles to First Mate positions. In addition to his onboard duties, he has also served as a chase boat captain on high-performance vessels such as Technohull Omega 47, Cigarette 41 Nighthawk AMG, and Axopar Brabus 800 Shadow—handling powerful multi-engine tenders with ease.

Taha’s expertise includes yacht preparation, mechanical and electronic maintenance, guest transfers, and overall operational support. His career trajectory reflects a solid work ethic, technical know-how, and a dependable character that earns trust from both captains and guests alike. Known for his calm demeanor, adaptability, and teamwork, he plays a key role in ensur zing seamless and safe voyages. Taha continues to grow as a maritime professional, bringing dedication and enthusiasm to every charter experience.

crew.name: Sahin Ozlahan
crew.bio:
Age: 40
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Izmir
Marital status: Single
Education: High School
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (intermediate)


Şahin is a highly skilled and creative yacht chef with over 18 years of culinary experience in luxury hospitality and yachting. He specializes in Mediterranean, Asian, Middle Eastern, and international cuisines with a strong focus on healthy, modern, and flavorful cooking. He also incorporates molecular gastronomy and decorative plating into his repertoire.

His yachting background includes working as Head Chef on board M/S Meira (55m charter), M/Y Lady Soul (35m), and most recently M/Y Parsley (40m private). He has designed full seasonal menus, delivered formal multi-course dinners, and consistently maintained top hygiene standards.

Şahin’s passion for food, adaptability, and deep understanding of guest preferences make him a valuable asset on both private and charter yachts.

crew.name: Muhammed Yazıcı
crew.bio:
Age: 29
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Erzurum
Marital status: Single
Education: Vocational Training School
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (intermediate)

With practical mechanical experience in the maritime industry and a strong background in engine maintenance and repair, Muhammed Yazıcı brings reliable technical support to the engine room. His onboard experience includes working on yachts such as M/Y Blue Scorpion, M/Y Atlantika, and M/Y Golden Horn, where he was responsible for various engineering and deck duties.

Muhammed has been directly involved in comprehensive engine room refits, including dismantling and reinstalling main engines, generator systems, shaft-propeller installations, and full mechanical system activations. His hands-on skills in both diesel and petrol engines, along with his familiarity with MTU systems and Kohler generators, make him a valuable asset during yard periods and in active charter seasons.

He is dependable, disciplined, and demonstrates strong teamwork with both the deck and engineering departments.

crew.name: Enes Aslan
crew.bio:
Age: 24
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Marmaris
Marital status: Single
Education: High School
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (fluent)

Enes was born in Marmaris and completed his seaman training in 2021. He began his career on a sailing yacht and later gained valuable experience on a motorsailer. Over the years, he has developed strong skills in sailing equipment, varnishing, polishing, painting, and general maintenance. He has also taken part in shipyard maintenance, further enhancing his technical abilities.

Throughout his time on chartered yachts, Enes has improved his communication skills and has been actively involved in guest service and water sports. He is motivated, team-oriented, and dedicated to providing high-quality service. 

Enes is now seeking a position as Deckhand or Bosun on yachts over 30 meters where he can continue to grow professionally in the yachting industry.

crew.name: Mehmet Ege Akdogan
crew.bio:
Age: 23
Gender: Male 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Muğla
Marital status: Single
Education: High School
Languages spoken: Turkish (native), English (intermediate)


Ege is a motivated deckhand with hands-on experience in general deck operations, maintenance, mooring, and tender handling. With strong adaptability and a team-oriented attitude, he supports day-to-day vessel routines and guest activities with a professional and proactive approach.

He is familiar with polishing, line handling, anchoring, washdowns, and basic mechanical assistance when required. Ege is committed to learning and developing further in the yachting industry, showing great discipline, reliability, and respect for onboard hierarchy and safety.

crew.name: Fatma Aydın
crew.bio:
Age: 26
Gender: Female 
Nationality: Turkish 
Born in: Uşak
Marital status: Single

She is highly skilled in silver service, table decoration, buffet presentation, barista-style coffee service, and overall interior maintenance. 

Her personal qualities—creative, friendly, hardworking, and a strong team player—make her a valuable asset on board. Fatma is passionate about delivering high-standard service and takes pride in creating a welcoming and elegant environment for guests.

She is responsible for the cleanliness and order of guest areas, cabins, and laundry, and is confident in providing well-organized, attentive service during charters.

She is a calm, responsible, and hardworking team member who easily adapts to different working conditions. Sinem believes teamwork is essential for maintaining a smooth operation onboard and preventing potential problems. She brings positive energy and discipline to every charter she takes part in.
